blocks.text: City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit Removal and Installation
1. City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit Removal
Remove the City Brake Active System radar/control unit cover (A).
Disconnect the coupler (A). Remove the City Brake Active System radar/control unit (B).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
